## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits prefix used
- [ ] Co-Authored-By trailer added for AI-assisted commits
- [ ] docs updated (docs-first) if behavior or structure changed
- [ ] ADR added/updated if an irreversible decision was made
- [ ] manifest version bumped if a user-facing feat merges (release trigger gate)
